ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team the player is associated with */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_number" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "player_type" TEXT /* Type of player (e.g., rookie, veteran) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the team plays */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular, playoff) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the game record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the game record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played by the player */,
  "pts" REAL /* Points scored by the player */,
  "reb" REAL /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "ast" REAL /* Assists made by the player */,
  "net_rating" REAL /* Net rating for the player */,
  "oreb_pct" REAL /* Offensive rebound percentage */,
  "dreb_pct" REAL /* Defensive rebound percentage */,
  "usg_pct" REAL /* Usage percentage */,
  "ts_pct" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "ast_pct" REAL /* Assist percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the stat record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the stat record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 1996-97) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the season record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the season record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player drafted */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year of the draft */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "draft_number" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the draft record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the draft record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_draft_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is injured */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of the injury in days */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the injury record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the injury record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
